response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but his background leans heavily toward web, mobile, and embedded systems with languages like JavaScript, TypeScript, and D. His C++ experience is limited to early roles (e.g., National Instruments) and lacks depth in modern C++ practices, multi-threading, or industrial automation-specific protocols. Additionally, his resume does not reflect expertise in secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 standards, which are critical for this role. While he demonstrates strong problem-solving and architectural skills, the misalignment with core technical competencies and security requirements significantly reduces his fit.
strengths: Strong multi-language and full-stack development experience
Proven track record in architectural design and DevOps practices
Hands-on experience with high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency apps, real-time data)
concerns: Limited recent and deep C++ experience (focus on Node.js, TypeScript, D)
No demonstrated expertise in secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 standards
Lacks exposure to industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.) or cloud platforms like Azure

key_factors.factor: Secure development lifecycle (SDL) and IEC 62443 compliance
Industrial automation protocols and cloud platform experience
